vitals.aid_stations: Regular rest stops with food, drinks, and sport nutrition
vitals.participation_trend: Consistent popularity since 2009, raising millions for charity
vitals.location: Land's End to John O'Groats, UK

course_description.overview: Fully-supported 9-stage ride from Land's End to John O'Groats through Cornwall, rolling hills of northern England, Lake District, and Scottish Highlands, covering cliff tops, moorlands, hidden roads, and soaring mountains across 23 counties in England, Wales, and Scotland.

key_segments.name: England Stages (1-4)
key_segments.description: Rugged coastline of Cornwall through rolling hills and valleys of northern England.

key_segments.name: Scotland Stages (5-9)
key_segments.description: Barren majesty of Scottish Highlands with stunning coastal roads and historic sites.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Iconic end-to-end challenge testing stamina over 980 miles in 9 days, with premium support including mechanical, medical, and chaperone services.

logistics.getting_there: Riders travel to Land's End start; daily bag transport provided to basecamps.
logistics.accommodation: Overnight basecamps with pre-set 2-person tents, power showers, and fantastic food.
logistics.registration_details: Registration £599 with minimum fundraising £2,600 for charity; secure place via partner charity forms or dropdown selection.
logistics.bike_logistics: Fully signposted route; expert mechanical support throughout.
logistics.local_considerations: Event spans England, Wales, Scotland; camping under stars; training program tailored to all levels provided.

final_verdict.one_liner: Premier fully-supported LEJOG charity ride delivering epic UK scenery and camaraderie.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Charity cyclists seeking a bucket-list end-to-end adventure with full logistical support.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the notable scenery, support, and sense of achievement at accessible entry cost.
pro_tips: Pack light for daily bag transport.
